title: Passenger freighter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|passenger [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]]|[[Passenger liner/Legends|passenger liners]]}}
A '''passenger freighter''' was a class of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] designed and manufactured largely for the mass transportation of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] passengers.

==History==
Around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], a 400 meter-long [[Corellia StarDrive]] [[Alpha-class heavy transport|''Alpha''-class heavy transport]] called the ''[[Sun Runner]]''was used as a passenger freighter by the [[Margrave Octan]] of the [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector]] to transport his family and 867 [[colonist]]s to the [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Nallastia]], in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].<ref name="Star Wars Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner">''[[Star Wars Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner]]''</ref>

Around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Procurator of Justice]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Hethrir]] had a fleet of such freighters constructed for the use of storing his enemies in [[Suspended animation/Legends|suspended animation]] including the remnants of his [[Firrerreo/Legends|own people]] after he collaborated with the Empire to destroy their [[Firrerre/Legends|homeworld]].

Hethrir believed that both he and the Empire would last a thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. Thus, after a thousand years, Hethrir planned to return to those freighters and awake their prisoners from their sleep, in the hopes that they would remember him as an all-powerful god whom they had to obey.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner]]''
*''[[The Crystal Star]]''
